---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed API

How would you like this feature to work? Provide example code if possible.

```typescript
// Example usage
import { newFunction } from 'receta/module'

const result = newFunction(input)
```

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions or workarounds have you considered?

## Related Modules

Which Receta module(s) would this feature belong to? (result, option, async, etc.)

## Real-World Use Case

Describe a real-world scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with Receta's design principles
- [ ] I would be willing to contribute this feature (optional)
